rationale: The citing note explicitly says the 2024 paper “extends graphical-perception findings” about how display format changes judgment, and the cited 2021 paper is directly about graph display mode (animated vs. static) altering judgments via a visual-attention mechanism. Given this strong topical/mechanism alignment and a confirmed DOI-level match (10.1177/00222437211002128), this is plausibly a substantive theory/mechanism source rather than an obvious incidental mention.
